action.reasoning: Observation: iter 8 eval with swa_epoch_50.pt + TTA gave 0.6764, far below best 0.7636 (iter 5, ConvNeXt+GCE+Mixup+SWA). Time remaining 1.748h. Analysis: swa checkpoint likely from older run; TTA may be harmful. Best result from ConvNeXt with GCE+Mixup+SWA. To improve, a larger backbone (ViT‑B/16 CLIP, 86M) can potentially capture cleaner patterns under label noise. GCE+Mixup+SWA will be reused. 20‑epoch ViT training should finish within ~30 min, leaving time for further iterations. Decision: update model.py with ViT backbone, adapt train.py for ViT (CLIP normalization, SWA, cosine schedule), simplify predict.py to center‑crop (no TTA), train 20 epochs, submit eval with best checkpoint.
